name: Aspinwall and Company Limited
summary: Aspinwall and Company Limited, a multi-line business organization, engages in coffee processing and trading, rubber plantation, natural fiber, and shipping and logistics businesses worldwide. Its Coffee segment is involved in the plantation, processing, trading, and export of coffee. The company's Plantation segment owns and manages approximately 2,000 acres of rubber plantations, as well as produces centrifuged latex and technically specified natural rubber. Its Natural Fibre segment produces entrance and corridor mats, carpets, mattings, rugs, runners, and mesh mattings; PVC and rubber-backed natural fiber products, and jute floor-coverings and furnishings, as well as supplies natural fiber geotextiles, which are used in environment engineering to prevent soil erosion; and coir pith, which is used in horticulture to grow plants. The company's Logistics segment provides liner, custom house agency, freight forwarding, air and bulk cargo, ship agency, stevedoring, warehousing, and project and over-dimensional cargo handling services. Aspinwall and Company Limited was founded in 1867 and is headquartered in Mangalore, India.
